releases.description:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [1.1.0] - 2024-05-21
### :sparkles: New Features
- [`3846ccd`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/3846ccda216c10e16bec0b04eb2c00d489bfae78) - use ViewPlugin & CM6 *(commit by [@WoodenMaiden](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden))*
- [`5ef84f8`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/5ef84f8e1a05402d41a9feec6e076bcb73cba1af) - add logger for development *(commit by [@WoodenMaiden](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden))*

### :bug: Bug Fixes
- [`1319e78`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/1319e781fab4df27a7f30be77af37a78d0216252) - **deps**: update *(commit by [@WoodenMaiden](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden))*
- [`dd9671c`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/dd9671cf2ba961b9ffac1cada80280c1f6c7f372) - **ci**: greet only one time *(commit by [@WoodenMaiden](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden))*
- [`0334016`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/03340164769072cd3aa448f264455fef30b28c5f) - **ci**: fix title check *(commit by [@WoodenMaiden](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden))*

### :wrench: Chores
- [`118cbb9`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/118cbb908381243f12d6c03ec324005f2cb6f75c) - **deps-dev**: Bump obsidian from 1.4.11 to 1.5.7-1 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`e982f9f`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/e982f9f82d96e54edfab2657c9fd3665bfe47149) - **deps**: Bump amannn/action-semantic-pull-request *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`1930b54`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/1930b54d4bff2a896283250336b930890bff1b11) - **deps-dev**: Bump @types/node from 20.8.10 to 20.9.1 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`3f9123d`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/3f9123d8981407d2c6b342f35fc358c6fbcea914) - **deps**: Bump amannn/action-semantic-pull-request *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`e7113e5`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/e7113e5279acfa3903c1ea081c4af25278e8e59d) - **deps-dev**: Bump @types/node from 20.8.9 to 20.8.10 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`d29bdd6`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/d29bdd625f54f8b36bfc9510ee9e9b69c2dc2507) - **deps-dev**: Bump @types/node from 20.8.8 to 20.8.9 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`ea345c6`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/ea345c6af23d042f9de5cae2630c67ae608c7871) - **deps-dev**: Bump @types/node from 20.8.7 to 20.8.8 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`aa6042f`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/aa6042f7a055e18f8edc758ba2adf58dc3bbc884) - **deps**: Bump actions/setup-node from 3 to 4 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`24f515e`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/24f515eba60d3749a3533adea335cd2abf605301) - **deps-dev**: Bump typescript from 4.7.4 to 5.2.2 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`e9150a5`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/e9150a59247141b79055b9e8727d02d70460ca79) - **deps-dev**: Bump tslib from 2.4.0 to 2.6.2 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`9ac67a1`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/9ac67a17074cce3359a7d39ae40372dc4d7f1852) - **deps**: Bump actions/setup-node from 2 to 3 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`e1f57b9`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/e1f57b991d4133f3d26184f3db1b6c7aeee98f9c) - **deps**: Bump actions/checkout from 2 to 4 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
- [`d88a4b3`](https://github.com/WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations/commit/d88a4b365d38413c5aafc94e78816f4482fb4801) - **deps-dev**: Bump @types/node from 16.18.18 to 20.8.7 *(commit by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot))*
